text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Rice Shower by the Three
Goddesses statue, staring into the fountain.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I heard that if you pray to the Goddesses and toss
a coin into the fountain, they'll make your wish
come true.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And... I want to become someone who can bring
happiness to everyone around me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That's such a big thing to ask for, though... so I
wasn't sure how many coins to toss.
choice_data_list: Put all your heart into one coin.
How about a coin for each Goddess?
Try tossing in a whole bunch!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll try to squeeze all my thoughts into it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Three Goddesses... Please make my wish
come true!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Big Brother, guess what! I didn't bring misfortune
to anyone today!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Big Sister, guess what! I didn't bring misfortune to
anyone today!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Nothing went wrong, and everyone had a nice,
happy day.
choice_data_list: The Goddesses must have heard your prayer.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I hope so... It feels like they did, at least.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? The fountain stopped...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'll try to squeeze all my thoughts into
them.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Three Goddesses... Please make my wish
come true!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wait, is this—we got a winning popsicle stick!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, Big Brother? Would you eat the winning one?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, Big Sister? Would you eat the winning one?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I want to give this good luck to you... and
make you happy.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I want to give this good luck to you... and
make you happy.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... The Goddesses must have granted my
wish.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? The fountain stopped...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'll try to squeeze all my thoughts into
them.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Three Goddesses... Please make my wish
come true!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Eep! I'm so sorry! I didn't mean to knock into
you...

text_block_list.name: Lady A
text_block_list.text: Y-You're a life-saver!

text_block_list.name: Lady A
text_block_list.text:
That car there just ran a red. If you hadn't pushed
me off the crosswalk, it would've hit me... Thank
you so much!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? I... I did something good?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Three Goddesses... Thank you for granting
my wish.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? The fountain stopped...

text_block_list.name: Janitor
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, there's a coin blocking the drainpipe. I
guess there must've been a lot of students
offering prayers, huh? Oh well, it was overdue for
a cleaning anyway.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh no... This is all my fault.
choice_data_list: That's not true. It could've been anyone's coin.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
No! It's always my fault when something goes
wrong! Always...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, Mr. Janitor! I'll help clean the fountain!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother... Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister... Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Janitor
text_block_list.text:
Whew! Thanks, you two. We got that done
lightning fast!
choice_data_list: You were a good helper, Rice.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
M-me? But it's my fault it was clogged in the first
place...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm just glad we were able to get it cleaned up...
